title: goodenia heterophylla subsp. eglandulosa
intro: Goodenia heterophylla subsp. eglandulosa, also known as Eglandular Goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Goodenia heterophylla subsp. eglandulosa include its potential to treat minor injuries, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
